booking.title: BOOKING
booking.subtitle: Select your session type and time slots. Our system will show you real-time availability.

booking.select_service_desc: Choose the type of service that fits your project
booking.with_engineer_desc: Guided session with a professional sound engineer
booking.deducted_session: deducted from balance on session day

booking.name: Full name
booking.message_placeholder: Describe your project, your specific needs...
booking.verify_identity_desc: For self-service sessions, identity verification is required
booking.not_available: Sorry, this slot is not available.

booking.fill_all_fields: Please fill in all required fields
booking.login_required_desc: To book a session, you must be logged in to your Make Music account.
booking.admin_access: Full calendar access • Free booking • ID verification disabled
booking.vip_booking_simplified: Simplified booking: select your slot directly from the calendar.
booking.select_service_above: Choose a service above to access the booking form
booking.processing_desc: Once the engineer has completed the work, we will contact you by email or WhatsApp to offer dates for the listening session at the studio.
booking.be_present_mixing: If you want to be present during the mix,

booking.to_set_date: to set a date with the sound engineer.
booking.vip_free_booking: Free booking with your VIP code
booking.trusted_client_desc: You are a trusted client. You can book without identity verification and pay in cash at the studio.
booking.rest_paid_at_studio: The rest will be paid at the studio
booking.rest_after_listening: The rest after the listening session
booking.id_not_required_vip: ID verification not required with your VIP code

booking.promo_cash_payment: Cash payment enabled - no deposit required.

booking.name_min_2: Name must be at least 2 characters
booking.fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields
booking.verify_before_payment: Please verify your identity before proceeding to payment
booking.use_account_email: Please use your account email (login required).
booking.booking_confirmed_cash: A confirmation email has been sent. Payment will be made in cash at the studio.

booking.payment_confirmed_desc: Your booking has been registered. A confirmation email has been sent.
